revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-000

A very common metal, found naturally as iron oxide. It is little used now in its pure form, but is the principle constituent of cast iron and steel.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Iron}}
